summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of NeuroScope mechanistic interpretability platform. All 12 user stories tested successfully. Run creation, trajectory analysis, causal patching, attribution graphs, NL queries, and experiment management all working correctly.

minor_issues.issue: Test specification references experiment slug 'agentic-mechanistic' which doesn't exist
minor_issues.impact: Documentation mismatch - actual seeded experiments use different slugs (hallucination-propagation, tool-call-prediction, reasoning-collapse, ioi-persistence, self-correction)
minor_issues.note: Functionality works correctly with actual experiment slugs. This is a spec/documentation issue, not a code bug.

passed_tests: US-1: POST /api/v1/runs - Run creation and completion in ~22s (n_steps=3)
US-2: GET /api/v1/runs/{id} - Full trajectory with steps, feature_timelines, progress, layer_l2_norms, top_features, hallucination signals, activation_path
US-3: POST /api/v1/runs/{id}/patch - Single patch with KL=0.5617, significant=True, 5 token_changes, interpretation paragraph
US-4: POST /api/v1/runs/{id}/patch-matrix - 18 patch results across 3 layers (3,7,10), 9 significant patches
US-5: POST /api/v1/runs/{id}/query - NL query returns grounded answer (935 chars) citing layers/features/steps
US-6: GET /api/v1/experiments - Returns 5 experiments with hypothesis and finding fields
US-7: GET /api/v1/experiments/{slug} - Full experiment with steps, feature_timelines, patch_matrix, finding (tested with hallucination-propagation)
US-8: Experiment slug fallback - Both /runs/{slug}/query and /runs/{slug}/patch work with experiment slugs
US-9: POST /api/v1/runs/{id}/attribution - Attribution graph with 12 nodes and 65 edges with positive/negative weights
US-10: GET /api/v1/suggested-tasks - Returns 6 categorized task suggestions
US-11: GET /api/v1/health - Returns status:ok with model info (gpt2, 12 layers)
US-12: Activation persistence - 3 activation files persisted as .npz under /app/backend/data/activations/{run_id}/
action_item_for_main_agent: Optional: Update test specification or documentation to reference actual experiment slugs (hallucination-propagation, tool-call-prediction, reasoning-collapse, ioi-persistence, self-correction) instead of 'agentic-mechanistic'. This is a minor documentation issue - all functionality works correctly.

data_persistence.experiments: 5 pre-seeded experiments in MongoDB experiments collection

cross_step_patching.description: Novel research contribution - patches one step's residual stream into another step's forward pass
cross_step_patching.metrics: Returns KL divergence, significance boolean, top-5 token probability shifts, and LLM interpretation
cross_step_patching.tested: Single patch and batch patch-matrix both working correctly

hallucination_scoring.description: 3-signal risk score (entropy + attention diffusion + uncertainty features)
hallucination_scoring.position: Early-warning diagnostic with ~20-30% intervention success rate
hallucination_scoring.tested: Hallucination signals present in all step outputs
